data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp uses a microservices architecture to scale efficiently and facilitate independent development and deployment.
data.technical_spec: Each service is deployed in Docker containers orchestrated by Kubernetes.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: All messages sent on WhatsApp are secured with end-to-end encryption.
data.technical_spec: Encryption protocols include the Signal Protocol ensuring privacy and security.

data.title: Cross-Platform Support
data.description: The app runs seamlessly on multiple operating systems including iOS, Android, and Web.
data.technical_spec: Built with React Native for consistent cross-platform development.

data.title: Real-Time Communication
data.description: WhatsApp facilitates real-time messaging and calling.
data.technical_spec: Uses WebRTC and XMPP protocols for real-time communications.

data.title: Scalable Infrastructure
data.description: Infrastructure capable of handling billions of messages daily without latency.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes a combination of load balancing, caching, and distributed databases.
